title: Fluffy American Beef Stir-fry
description: A romantic and fluffy American dish featuring tender beef cooked in a rich beef stock with a hint of nuttiness from a touch of soy sauce, all served as a light yet satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over high heat.
Add onion and garlic, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until softened.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce and water. Add to the pan with beef cubes and all-purpose flour, stirring constantly for about 1 minute to coat the meat evenly.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for about 5-7 minutes or until the liquid has thickened slightly and the beef is tender.
Stir occasionally, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
